arts.ttl: Report: Musiala to start on bench against Barcelona
arts.sum: According to Sky Germany, Jamal Musiala will start on the bench for Bayern Munich against FC Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich no longer the desired club for Bayer Leverkusen defender Jonathan Tah
arts.sum: Jonathan Tah flirted with the Bavarians over the summer, but the move never came to be, and now his options have grown: Jonathan Tah is still determined to leave Bayer Leverkusen on a free transfer next summer.

arts.ttl: Wing Stop: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany keeps communication open with competitive winger group
arts.sum: With Michael Olise, Serge Gnabry, Kingsley Coman, and Leroy Sané all available at the wing position to face FC Barcelona, Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany has plenty of options to choose from. When asked if he has a “pecking order” at the position, Kompany declined to answer, but did say that he keeps an open line of communication with all of this players.

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona name squad for Bayern Munich clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this afternoon unveiled the squad of players set to be tasked with getting the better of Bayern Munich on Wednesday night. And, as proved the…

arts.ttl: Madrid and Barcelona apply for 2027 Champions League final
arts.sum: The decision-making process for the 2027 Champions League finals is underway, and Spain’s two biggest cities are angling to host both of them. This year San Mames will hold the Europa League final in Bilbao. As per Relevo, the Metropolitano in Madrid is one of two favourites alongside the Olympic Stadium in Baku, Azerbaijan, to […] The post Madrid and Barcelona apply for 2027 Champions League final appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: 2 key Real Madrid stars ruled out of Barcelona showdown through injury
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to be without the services of a pair of leading players for this weekend’s Clásico. This comes owing to respective injuries suffered whilst lining out against…

arts.ttl: FC Barcelona to Wear White Shorts Against Dortmund
arts.sum: Barcelona (men) players are likely to wear white shorts with their home kit in the Champions League match against Dortmund on 11 December, according to Barcelona kit expert @memorabilia1899.

arts.ttl: Can Barcelona end their Bayern Munich nightmare?
arts.sum: Barcelona host Bayern Munich in the Champions League this evening, in a contest between two teams with rich history in this competition. The new format of the Champions League was designed to bring together the top teams more often and the Spanish and German league leaders go head-to-head in a heavyweight tussle tonight. Barcelona and […] The post Can Barcelona end their Bayern Munich nightmare? first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Second Real Madrid star ruled out of Barcelona game following Borussia Dortmund comeback
arts.sum: Real Madrid manager Carlo Ancelotti has a wave of euphoria to ride into El Clasico after an inspired second half comeback against Borussia Dortmund, but it has come at a price. After Rodrygo Goes limped off with a hamstring tear, Thibaut Courtois is also set to miss their Saturday night date with Barcelona. The Belgian […] The post Second Real Madrid star ruled out of Barcelona game following Borussia Dortmund comeback appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Arsenal have edge over Barcelona in race for potential €90million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal may reportedly have the edge over Barcelona in the potential transfer race for Aston Villa’s in-form young striker Jhon Duran. The Colombia international only recently signed a new contract at Villa Park, but his superb form on the pitch perhaps unsurprisingly means that speculation over his future is not about to quieten down.
